channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Tourist dies after being bitten at snake-charming show in Egypt
item.description: A snake, reported to be a cobra, crawled into the victim's pants and bit him as he watched a show, police said.

item.title: Anonymous tip system started in wake of Sandy Hook shooting has fielded nearly 400,000 reports
How does Comey's 'threat' against Trump compare to other defendants charged by DOJ?
item.description: A review of some cases cited by acting AG Todd Blanche as being similar to the indictment against James Comey suggests the Comey case could face a ste...

item.title: WATCH: King Charles, Trump share quips, tout US-UK relationship at state dinner
item.description: President Donald Trump and first lady Melania Trump welcomed King Charles III and Queen Camilla to the White House on Tuesday evening for a state dinn...
